headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Trimble (TRMB) Could Surge 53.96%: Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for Trimble (TRMB) points to a 54% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
